Author: SaMo (fork: Originaljsx)
Name: PvP Tracker (API 15)
Punchline: PvP match history and stats tracker — Dalamud API 15 fork.
Description: Record, browse and filter your Crystalline Conflict, Frontline and Rival Wings match history, view match scoreboards and view aggregated statistics like win rate and average damage dealt per match. Community fork of wrath16/PvpStats restoring compatibility with Dalamud API 15 (FFXIV patch 7.5).
Changelog:
* Layer 2 — shield-aware metrics. Curated catalog of shield-applying status IDs (Galvanize, Catalyze, Eukrasian Diagnosis/Prognosis, Heart of Stone/Light/Corundum, Divine Benison, Aquaveil, Sheltron, Holy Sheltron, Bloodwhetting, Oblation, Macrocosmos, etc.).
* Four new rollup columns: shields_applied_count, shield_uptime_seconds, shielded_hits_taken (zero-damage hits while you were shielded), shielded_hits_caused_others (zero-damage hits on teammates whose shield YOU sourced).
* CSV export includes the new columns.
